Urgent repairs

Report an urgent repair

Fast dispatch of verified artisans for repairs that can't wait.

Got a leak, fault, or breakage that can't wait? Log it here and we'll dispatch a verified artisan fast.

For emergencies, call now: +233 558 244 098 / +233 593 868 612.

Building Africa through technology and construction. Trusted connections, quality execution — from an urgent leak to a finished building.
